'''âd-z-r-r''' ('''kadazreroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:experience|experience]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:experience|experience]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-z-r-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadazreroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazreroko|thidazreroko]] || [[word:jidazreroko|jidazreroko]] || [[word:shidazreroko|shidazreroko]] || [[word:kidazreroko|kidazreroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudazreroko|thuthudazreroko]] || [[word:jujudazreroko|jujudazreroko]] || [[word:shushudazreroko|shushudazreroko]] || [[word:kukudazreroko|kukudazreroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudazreroko|thudazreroko]] || [[word:judazreroko|judazreroko]] || [[word:shudazreroko|shudazreroko]] || [[word:kudazreroko|kudazreroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudazreroko|thudazreroko]] || [[word:judazreroko|judazreroko]] || [[word:shudazreroko|shudazreroko]] || [[word:kudazreroko|kudazreroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedazreroko|thedazreroko]] || [[word:jedazreroko|jedazreroko]] || [[word:shedazreroko|shedazreroko]] || [[word:kedazreroko|kedazreroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodazreroko|thothodazreroko]] || [[word:jojodazreroko|jojodazreroko]] || [[word:shoshodazreroko|shoshodazreroko]] || [[word:kokodazreroko|kokodazreroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodazreroko|thodazreroko]] || [[word:jodazreroko|jodazreroko]] || [[word:shodazreroko|shodazreroko]] || [[word:kodazreroko|kodazreroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodazreroko|thodazreroko]] || [[word:jodazreroko|jodazreroko]] || [[word:shodazreroko|shodazreroko]] || [[word:kodazreroko|kodazreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdazreroko|thĂŠdazreroko]] || [[word:jĂŠdazreroko|jĂŠdazreroko]] || [[word:shĂŠdazreroko|shĂŠdazreroko]] || [[word:kĂŠdazreroko|kĂŠdazreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadazreroko|thathadazreroko]] || [[word:jajadazreroko|jajadazreroko]] || [[word:shashadazreroko|shashadazreroko]] || [[word:kakadazreroko|kakadazreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadazreroko|thadazreroko]] || [[word:jadazreroko|jadazreroko]] || [[word:shadazreroko|shadazreroko]] || [[word:kadazreroko|kadazreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadazreroko|thadazreroko]] || [[word:jadazreroko|jadazreroko]] || [[word:shadazreroko|shadazreroko]] || [[word:kadazreroko|kadazreroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
